title: Alcohol Only
description: Adding multiple alcohol related drinks and items. For the alcoholics among us...
body:
# Alcohol Only This mod adds a bunch of alcohol-related features into the game, such as Beer, Jägermeister, drunkness effect, and much more. ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VEs3AHJu/images/a0d7e9a8c52d92b41d12369896057489a69b73de.png) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VEs3AHJu/images/082559212913e04344ea830f6e51a503f8a4d599.png) ## Features
Features - Drinks - Beer Bottle - Vodka Bottle - Wine Bottle - Jägermeister Bottle - Beer Glass - Weapons - Broken bottle - Molotov - Blocks - Alcohol Barrel - Mobs - New Villager profession called: Alcoholic - Other - New Effect **Crafting recipes available at the bottom of the Gallery tab**
Interactions - All bottles are placeble and stack on the ground. - When a bottle is placed, right clicking it with a spruce plank turns it into a creat type of thing. - Taking any bottle into the off hand makes it throwable with right click. - Right click to drinks out of a bottle. - Right clicking an empty beer mug with an beer bottle fills the mug. - Right clicking a alcohol barrel with an alcohol bottle fills the barrel. - Barrels can be emptied with a glass bottle. - When alcohol is consumed, it will give you a new Effect that will get higher as you drink more and give you other bad effects.
## Suggestions Found a bug or want to suggest something? Open an issue on [Github](https://github.com/HerrChaos/alcohol_only/issues/new)
